description: ClusterFederatedTrustDomain is the Schema for the clusterfederatedtrustdomains API

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object. Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and may reject unrecognized values. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents. Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to. Cannot be updated. In CamelCase. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: ClusterFederatedTrustDomainSpec defines the desired state of ClusterFederatedTrustDomain

bundleEndpointProfile.description: BundleEndpointProfile is the profile for the bundle endpoint.

endpointSPIFFEID.description: EndpointSPIFFEID is the SPIFFE ID of the bundle endpoint. It is required for the "https_spiffe" profile.

type.description: Type is the type of the bundle endpoint profile.

bundleEndpointURL.description: BundleEndpointURL is the URL of the bundle endpoint. It must be an HTTPS URL and cannot contain userinfo (i.e. username/password).

className.description: Set the class of controller to handle this object.

trustDomain.description: TrustDomain is the name of the trust domain to federate with (e.g. example.org)

trustDomainBundle.description: TrustDomainBundle is the contents of the bundle for the referenced trust domain. This field is optional when the resource is created.

status.description: ClusterFederatedTrustDomainStatus defines the observed state of ClusterFederatedTrustDomain
